name: Terri Sewell
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $251,301 for Terri Sewell in U.S. House, AL-07. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
